rawText:
```json
{
  "freshness_score": 4,
  "trust_score": 6,
  "conversion_score": 5,
  "design_age_estimate": "slightly_outdated",
  "summary": "The website presents a functional but visually dated design that could benefit from modernization to improve trust and conversion rates for local search customers.",
  "issues": [
    {
      "id": "hero_gradient",
      "severity": "major",
      "title": "Outdated Hero Gradient",
      "what_observed": "The large blue gradient background in the hero section appears dated and unprofessional.",
      "why_problem": "Gradients like this were popular in the early 2000s and now make the business look less current and trustworthy. A potential customer searching for a roof restoration service might assume the business isn't up-to-date with modern techniques.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "A clean, flat color background or a high-quality, relevant image of a restored roof. Use a single primary brand color.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Replace the gradient with a flat, modern background color (e.g., a muted blue or gray) or a professional photograph of a completed roof restoration project."
    },
    {
      "id": "form_length",
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Excessive Form Fields",
      "what_observed": "The quote request form contains numerous fields, including 'Roof Type', 'Scope of Work', 'Work Type', and 'Roof age'.",
      "why_problem": "A long form creates friction and discourages potential customers from submitting a request. People searching for local services want quick and easy contact options. Requiring too much information upfront feels intrusive and time-consuming.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "A simplified form with only essential fields: Name, Phone Number, and a brief 'Description' field. Offer to gather more details during a phone consultation.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Reduce the form to Name, Phone, and Description. Add text like 'We'll discuss details over the phone' to reassure users."
    },
    {
      "id": "mobile_form_visibility",
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Form Partially Hidden on Mobile",
      "what_observed": "On mobile, a significant portion of the form is initially hidden below the fold, requiring scrolling to view all fields.",
      "why_problem": "Users may not scroll to see the entire form, leading to incomplete submissions or abandonment. This is especially problematic on mobile where screen real estate is limited.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "A single-column layout on mobile with the entire form visible above the fold. Prioritize essential fields and use a clear call to action.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Implement a responsive design that stacks form fields vertically on mobile, ensuring all fields are visible without scrolling."
    },
    {
      "id": "phone_number_repetition",
      "severity": "major",
      "title": "Repeated Phone Number",
      "what_observed": "The phone number '(07) 3132 1605' is displayed multiple times on the page.",
      "why_problem": "While making the phone number visible is good, excessive repetition can appear spammy or desperate. It doesn't build trust.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "Display the phone number prominently in the header and potentially once in the footer. Make it easily clickable on mobile.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Remove redundant phone number instances, focusing on clear visibility in the header and footer."
    },
    {
      "id": "image_quality",
      "severity": "minor",
      "title": "Low-Resolution Image",
      "what_observed": "The image of the house on the right side of the screen appears slightly pixelated and low resolution.",
      "why_problem": "Low-quality images detract from the overall professionalism of the website and can make the business appear less credible.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "High-resolution, professionally shot images of completed roof restoration projects.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Replace the existing image with a high-resolution version or a new, professional photograph."
    }
  ],
  "positive_observations": [
    "Clear call to action ('Call (07) 3132 1605') is present.",
    "Navigation is straightforward and includes essential pages.",
    "The use of a local keyword ('Brisbane') in the logo and content is good for SEO."
  ],
  "redesign_priorities": ["1. Simplify the quote request form to reduce friction", "2. Modernize the hero section with a flat design and high-quality imagery", "3. Ensure the entire form is visible above the fold on mobile devices"],
  "confidence": 0.85
}
```

parsedJson.summary: The website presents a functional but visually dated design that could benefit from modernization to improve trust and conversion rates for local search customers.

issues.title: Outdated Hero Gradient
issues.what_observed: The large blue gradient background in the hero section appears dated and unprofessional.
issues.why_problem: Gradients like this were popular in the early 2000s and now make the business look less current and trustworthy. A potential customer searching for a roof restoration service might assume the business isn't up-to-date with modern techniques.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A clean, flat color background or a high-quality, relevant image of a restored roof. Use a single primary brand color.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the gradient with a flat, modern background color (e.g., a muted blue or gray) or a professional photograph of a completed roof restoration project.

issues.title: Excessive Form Fields
issues.what_observed: The quote request form contains numerous fields, including 'Roof Type', 'Scope of Work', 'Work Type', and 'Roof age'.
issues.why_problem: A long form creates friction and discourages potential customers from submitting a request. People searching for local services want quick and easy contact options. Requiring too much information upfront feels intrusive and time-consuming.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simplified form with only essential fields: Name, Phone Number, and a brief 'Description' field. Offer to gather more details during a phone consultation.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the form to Name, Phone, and Description. Add text like 'We'll discuss details over the phone' to reassure users.

issues.title: Form Partially Hidden on Mobile
issues.what_observed: On mobile, a significant portion of the form is initially hidden below the fold, requiring scrolling to view all fields.
issues.why_problem: Users may not scroll to see the entire form, leading to incomplete submissions or abandonment. This is especially problematic on mobile where screen real estate is limited.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A single-column layout on mobile with the entire form visible above the fold. Prioritize essential fields and use a clear call to action.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Implement a responsive design that stacks form fields vertically on mobile, ensuring all fields are visible without scrolling.

issues.title: Repeated Phone Number
issues.what_observed: The phone number '(07) 3132 1605' is displayed multiple times on the page.
issues.why_problem: While making the phone number visible is good, excessive repetition can appear spammy or desperate. It doesn't build trust.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Display the phone number prominently in the header and potentially once in the footer. Make it easily clickable on mobile.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove redundant phone number instances, focusing on clear visibility in the header and footer.

issues.title: Low-Resolution Image
issues.what_observed: The image of the house on the right side of the screen appears slightly pixelated and low resolution.
issues.why_problem: Low-quality images detract from the overall professionalism of the website and can make the business appear less credible.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: High-resolution, professionally shot images of completed roof restoration projects.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the existing image with a high-resolution version or a new, professional photograph.

positive_observations: Clear call to action ('Call (07) 3132 1605') is present.
Navigation is straightforward and includes essential pages.
The use of a local keyword ('Brisbane') in the logo and content is good for SEO.
redesign_priorities: 1. Simplify the quote request form to reduce friction
2. Modernize the hero section with a flat design and high-quality imagery
3. Ensure the entire form is visible above the fold on mobile devices
